name: @ai-novel-diagnosis/ai-core
description: Shared analysis contracts for AI网文诊断台 triage, critique, full-book assets, and graph review.

scripts.format: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json tsdown.config.ts vitest.config.ts src
scripts.format:fix: oxfmt --write package.json tsconfig.json tsdown.config.ts vitest.config.ts src
scripts.check: node ../../scripts/run-pnpm.cjs run lint && node ../../scripts/run-pnpm.cjs run typecheck && node ../../scripts/run-pnpm.cjs run format
scripts.check:fix: node ../../scripts/run-pnpm.cjs run lint:fix && node ../../scripts/run-pnpm.cjs run format:fix
scripts.prepublishOnly: node ../../scripts/run-pnpm.cjs run check && node ../../scripts/run-pnpm.cjs run test && node ../../scripts/run-pnpm.cjs run build
